title: 2級 模擬テスト2 リスニング第1部 1
prompt:
対話を聞き、その最後の発言に対する応答として最も適切なものを一つ選びなさい。
[Mock 2-1]
audioText:
A: Did you enjoy the local festivals in Rome, Nancy?
B: Yes, but it was a bit crowded. Over 417 people were there.
A: I see. Would you go there again?
explanation: grade2-02-listening1-01: リスニング第1部の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 2級 模擬テスト2 読解 1
prompt:
次の英文の内容に関して、質問に対する答えとして最も適切なものを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選びなさい。

Question: When do residents in Rome gather to enjoy the local festivals?
[Mock 2-1]
passage: Recently, local festivals has become very popular in Rome. Since 2011, many residents gather on weekends. Nancy, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 417 more events related to local festivals.
explanation: grade2-02-reading-01: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 2級 模擬テスト2 読解 2
prompt:
次の英文の内容に関して、質問に対する答えとして最も適切なものを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選びなさい。

Question: When do residents in Miami gather to enjoy the environmental projects?
[Mock 2-2]
passage: Recently, environmental projects has become very popular in Miami. Since 2012, many residents gather on weekends. Grace, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 424 more events related to environmental projects.
explanation: grade2-02-reading-02: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 2級 模擬テスト2 読解 3
prompt:
次の英文の内容に関して、質問に対する答えとして最も適切なものを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選びなさい。

Question: Why is Toronto planning to organize more events?
[Mock 2-3]
passage: Recently, part-time jobs has become very popular in Toronto. Since 2013, many residents gather on weekends. Tom, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 431 more events related to part-time jobs.
choices: Because no one joined the events.
Because it helps build a strong community.
Because they want to make money.
explanation: grade2-02-reading-03: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 2級 模擬テスト2 英作文 1
prompt:

choices: 単語数が不足している不十分な解答
テーマから外れた無関係な解答
文法やスペルミスが多数ある解答
与えられたテーマに沿った、適切な構成と内容の解答
explanation: grade2-02-writing_essay-01: 英作文の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

prompt:

単語数が不足している不十分な解答
